    man: fix `man -K` search

    Quote re arg to grep in case it has spaces, and quote [:blank:] tr arg
    to avoid the shell interpreting [].

    PR:             272729
    Reviewed by:    Mina Galić <freebsd@igalic.co>
    Sponsored by:   The FreeBSD Foundation
